stemHtml: Long range cruise is a flight procedure which gives…

options.a: a specific range which is approximately 99% of maximum specific range and a lower cruise speed.
options.b: a specific range which is approximately 99% of maximum specific range and a higher cruise speed.
options.c: a 1% higher TAS for maximum specific range.
options.d: an IAS which is 1% higher than the IAS for maximum specific range.
